ValidationRule.description: Restricts updates to the Plant Admin field. Once populated, only the user currently assigned as the Plant Admin can reassign the field to a different user.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.GWB_Switch__c.Bypass_VRs__c), NOT($Permission.Central_Admin), NOT($Permission.Regional_Admin), NOT($Permission.GWB_System_Admin), ISCHANGED(Plant_Admin__c), NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Plant_Admin__c))), PRIORVALUE(Plant_Admin__c) <> $User.Id )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only the current Plant Admin can update this field once it has been set.
